Dark Mode

Bajaj Auto Limited

Summary

Mechanical Design Engineer at Bajaj Auto Limited, one of India's largest two and three-wheeler manufacturers. Over 3.5 years in R&D, I designed and validated engine components across ICE and EV platforms, with designs shipping on vehicles produced at a rate of 6.3 million annually. Recognized as a top 20% performer among a cohort of 100+ engineers, twice.

Skills Used

Mechanical Design Siemens NX GD&T Die Casting Injection Molding DFM/DFA FEA (ANSYS, HyperWorks) DFMEA DVP 8D Root Cause Analysis NXOpen Automation VAVE

Summary

Key Projects

  • Designed and developed crankcases, covers, and gaskets for two-wheelers, three-wheelers, and EV drive units, optimizing for weight, cost, and manufacturability across high-volume production programs
  • Conducted structural and contact pressure analysis for 20+ projects using ANSYS and HyperWorks, validating designs against durability and performance requirements
  • Automated gasket modeling and implemented a CAD verification process in Siemens NX using Visual Studio, cutting task duration by 76%
  • Led Value Analysis and Engineering initiatives, reducing clutch cover weight by 11% (110g) and saving $15,000+ annually through part optimization and consolidation
  • Performed 5+ DFMEAs for powertrain systems, collaborating with design, validation, and supplier quality teams to ensure parts met durability requirements
  • Coordinated root cause analysis on 100+ in-house and 10+ field failures, proposing design revisions and updating DFMEA and DVP documentation
